sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 87:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 87:1
items.html: Five of direct light, from Gevura to Yesod, and five of reflected light, from Tifferet to Malchut. They clothe as above, meaning direct light in the more refined vessels, and reflected light, each in its appropriate vessel.
